case_title: AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. AMEENAH F HANIFAH et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $200.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT HANIFAH, AMEENAH F
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF PLTFF. ASSIGNOR IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $6.44 INTEREST, $35.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HANIFAH, AMEENAH F

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HANIFAH, AMEENAH F DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2008
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC. SERVED AUG-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HANIFAH, AMEENAH F
DECLARATION OF ASSIGNMENT OF CLAIM TO PLTFF. AND IN SUPPORT OF AWARD OF COSTS, ATTY. FEES AND INTEREST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HANIFAH, AMEENAH F $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, $1,500.00 TREBLE DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,700.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION REQUESTING REDUCTION IN FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN REVENUE MANAGEMENT, INC.
